context: Tests whether the agent generates a Google-compliant XML product feed using the correct library, RSS structure, required fields, title optimization rules, price format, response headers, and proper handling of images, identifiers, and variant grouping.

checklist.name: xmlbuilder2 library
checklist.description: The XML feed is built using the `xmlbuilder2` package (imports `create` from `xmlbuilder2`), not a hand-concatenated string, DOM, or alternative XML library

checklist.name: RSS 2.0 with g namespace
checklist.description: The root element is `rss` with `version: '2.0'` and the attribute `xmlns:g` set to `'http://base.google.com/ns/1.0'`

checklist.name: g:id uses SKU
checklist.description: The `g:id` field is populated with the variant SKU (not a product ID, database ID, or other identifier)

checklist.name: Description max length
checklist.description: The `g:description` value is sliced or truncated to a maximum of 5000 characters

checklist.name: Title format and length
checklist.description: Titles are constructed in the order: Brand, Product Name, then variant attributes (color, size, material); the final string is capped at 150 characters

checklist.name: Price format
checklist.description: Prices are formatted as `X.XX USD` — two decimal places followed by a space and the currency code (e.g., `29.99 USD`), not as a plain number or object

checklist.name: Cache-Control header
checklist.description: The feed endpoint sets a `Cache-Control` header of `public, max-age=3600` (1-hour TTL)

checklist.name: Content-Type header
checklist.description: The feed endpoint sets `Content-Type` to `application/xml; charset=utf-8`

checklist.name: Additional images
checklist.description: Multiple `g:additional_image_link` entries are included (up to 9 additional images, i.e., images at index 1–9), providing at least 3 total images per product where available

checklist.name: identifier_exists correctness
checklist.description: `g:identifier_exists` is set to `'yes'` when a GTIN is present and `'no'` only when it is absent — NOT hardcoded to a single value for all products

checklist.name: item_group_id for variants
checklist.description: All variants of the same product share the same `g:item_group_id` value (the parent product's ID), not the variant ID

checklist.name: prettyPrint false
checklist.description: The XML is serialized with `prettyPrint: false` (compact output), not with indentation/newlines

checklist.name: Numeric product category
checklist.description: The `g:google_product_category` field uses a numeric taxonomy ID (e.g., `187`), not a human-readable category name string
